flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at California State University-Long Beach rose 21% between 2007 and 2010 ($8.2k → $10.0k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at California State University-Long Beach fell 11% between 2007 and 2010 (30.6k → 27.4k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at California State University-Long Beach fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.8% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at California State University-Long Beach rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 (34.2% → 38.0%).
